title: NVIDIA and Hugging Face bring distributed fine-tuning to Diffusers models
friendlyTitle: Fine-tuning open image and video models gets easier to scale
summary: NVIDIA and Hugging Face have integrated NeMo Automodel with Diffusers-format image and video models. The open-source workflow can load models directly from the Hugging Face Hub, fine-tune them from one GPU to large clusters and return compatible checkpoints without model rewrites or conversion steps.
friendlySummary: NVIDIA and Hugging Face connected NeMo Automodel with Diffusers. Developers can use the same basic training workflow on one GPU or many GPUs without converting the model first.
whyItMatters: Teams adapting open image or video models gain a more consistent path from small experiments to distributed training. The current flow-matching-only support and substantial GPU requirements still make model choice and infrastructure budgeting important.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This can save setup work when a team wants to adapt an open image or video model. Check the supported models and hardware costs before starting.
